companies.name: SK Hynix
companies.reason: SK Hynix is dominating headlines due to its strategic move to launch a massive $28 billion U.S. listing, driven by its critical role in the global AI supply chain and surging demand for high-bandwidth memory (HBM).

companies.name: Samsung Electronics
companies.reason: Samsung is trending following market projections indicating an 18-fold jump in quarterly profits, attributed to the explosion in AI-related hardware demand for their memory and semiconductor divisions.
